description_long: This is a large, detached residential house set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a driveway leading to the main entrance. The house features a symmetrical facade with a prominent central entryway, flanked by multiple windows and a gabled roof. Surrounding the house are manicured lawns, clusters of mature trees, and a backyard area that includes a patio and a swimming pool. The property is bordered by paved roads and a driveway that curves toward the garage area. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, with architectural details such as chimneys and dormer windows. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale neighborhood environment.
description: A large, light-colored suburban house with a gabled roof, surrounded by lawns, trees, a driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, garage area, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and additional landscaping with trees and open lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns
